'''βàöch-p-h-h''' ('''kachaphehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bebother|bebother]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-p-h-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bebother|bebother]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöch-p-h-h
|-
! Lemma
| kachaphehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichaphehoko|thichaphehoko]] || [[word:jichaphehoko|jichaphehoko]] || [[word:shichaphehoko|shichaphehoko]] || [[word:kichaphehoko|kichaphehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchaphehoko|thuthuchaphehoko]] || [[word:jujuchaphehoko|jujuchaphehoko]] || [[word:shushuchaphehoko|shushuchaphehoko]] || [[word:kukuchaphehoko|kukuchaphehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchaphehoko|thuchaphehoko]] || [[word:juchaphehoko|juchaphehoko]] || [[word:shuchaphehoko|shuchaphehoko]] || [[word:kuchaphehoko|kuchaphehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchaphehoko|thuchaphehoko]] || [[word:juchaphehoko|juchaphehoko]] || [[word:shuchaphehoko|shuchaphehoko]] || [[word:kuchaphehoko|kuchaphehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechaphehoko|thechaphehoko]] || [[word:jechaphehoko|jechaphehoko]] || [[word:shechaphehoko|shechaphehoko]] || [[word:kechaphehoko|kechaphehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochaphehoko|thothochaphehoko]] || [[word:jojochaphehoko|jojochaphehoko]] || [[word:shoshochaphehoko|shoshochaphehoko]] || [[word:kokochaphehoko|kokochaphehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochaphehoko|thochaphehoko]] || [[word:jochaphehoko|jochaphehoko]] || [[word:shochaphehoko|shochaphehoko]] || [[word:kochaphehoko|kochaphehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochaphehoko|thochaphehoko]] || [[word:jochaphehoko|jochaphehoko]] || [[word:shochaphehoko|shochaphehoko]] || [[word:kochaphehoko|kochaphehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠchaphehoko|thΟΠchaphehoko]] || [[word:jΟΠchaphehoko|jΟΠchaphehoko]] || [[word:shΟΠchaphehoko|shΟΠchaphehoko]] || [[word:kΟΠchaphehoko|kΟΠchaphehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachaphehoko|thathachaphehoko]] || [[word:jajachaphehoko|jajachaphehoko]] || [[word:shashachaphehoko|shashachaphehoko]] || [[word:kakachaphehoko|kakachaphehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachaphehoko|thachaphehoko]] || [[word:jachaphehoko|jachaphehoko]] || [[word:shachaphehoko|shachaphehoko]] || [[word:kachaphehoko|kachaphehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachaphehoko|thachaphehoko]] || [[word:jachaphehoko|jachaphehoko]] || [[word:shachaphehoko|shachaphehoko]] || [[word:kachaphehoko|kachaphehoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shachaphehithi|shachaphehithi]] || [[word:shachaphehiji|shachaphehiji]] || [[word:shachaphehishi|shachaphehishi]] || [[word:shachaphehiki|shachaphehiki]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shachaphehotho|shachaphehotho]] || [[word:shachaphehojo|shachaphehojo]] || [[word:shachaphehosho|shachaphehosho]] || [[word:shachaphehoko|shachaphehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
